core_mechanism: parametric amplification in a strongly driven asymmetric (anharmonic) two-state oscillator, where the drive amplitude sets an effective response frequency and the broken symmetry produces higher harmonics and extra resonances via nonlinear frequency mixing
brief_reason: The abstract describes a two-level system with broken inversion symmetry under a strong periodic drive behaving as a parametric oscillator with drive-amplitude-controlled (Rabi) frequency, additional harmonics, and a multitude of resonances enabling tunable parametric amplification and generation.
